title: Mobile saw mill apparatus
abstract: In one aspect the invention provides a mobile saw mill apparatus which includes a log deck configured to receive and locate a log to be milled. A log is secured by two rotatable mounting spikes, each being associated with opposite end of the log deck, and two lift assemblies each connecting a separate mounting spike to the log bed. These lift assemblies operation to move the log spikes towards and away from the log deck, and the log spikes can be rotated under the action at least one drive assembly which is operated by a programmable controller configured to issue control signals which control the degree to which a mounting spike and engaged log are rotated.
claims: Claims What we claim is: 1. A mobile saw mill apparatus which includes a log deck configured to receive and locate a log to be milled, and two rotatable mounting spikes, each being associated with opposite ends of the log deck and being configured to engage with an end of a log located by the log deck, and two lift assemblies, each lift assembly being operable to adjust the relative position of at least one of the rotatable log spikes to a log received by the log deck, and at least one drive assembly engaged with one or more rotatable mounting spike, said drive assembly or assemblies being operable to rotate a mounting spike and a log engaged with the mounting spike, and a programmable controller connected to said at least one drive assembly and being configured to issue control signals to said drive assembly or assemblies to control the degree to which a mounting spike and engaged log are rotated. 2. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 which includes a saw blade movable along the length of the log deck, said saw blade being configured to reciprocate along the length of the deck to make a plurality of cuts in a log engaged by the rotatable mounting spikes. 3. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 2 wherein the saw blade is a rotatable disc blade. 4. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 3 wherein the saw blade is swing blade capable of adjusting the orientation of the plane of the blade relative to the longitudinal axis of a log engaged by the rotatable mounting spikes. 5. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein the log bed defines a central depression arranged to receive and locate a log in the centre of the log bed. 6. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 5 wherein the central depression is formed at least in part by a log centralizing support which has a movable connection to the log bed. 7. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 which includes a centre levelling jack. 8. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 which includes a log end measurement system configured to provide an indication of the minimum diameter of a log supported by the log deck. 9. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 8 wherein the log end measurement system includes a laser range finder. 10. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 which includes an operator interface station incorporating a display system. 11. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 10 which includes a camera adjacent to a rotatable mounting spike located remotely from the operator interface station, said camera being configured to transmit images of the end of a log supported by the log deck to the display system of the operator interface station. 12. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein a lift assembly includes a hydraulic cylinder engaged with a mounting spike configured to move the mounting spike towards and away from the log deck. 13. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein each mounting spike is associated with a hydraulic cylinder configured to drive the mounting spike in to the end of a log located by the log bed. 14. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein each lift assembly has a movable connection to the log bed allowing connection of the lift assembly to different regions of the log bed. 15. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 wherein a drive assembly is formed by an electric motor and transmission system. 16. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 15 which includes a self- braking motor and gear box. 17. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 1 which includes a perpendicular saw blade and jig. 18. A mobile saw mill apparatus as claimed in claim 2 which includes a belt sander. 19. A computer program product for milling a log using a mobile saw mill apparatus, the computer program product being store on a non-transitory tangible computer readable medium and including instructions that when executed cause a programmable controller to: Â· receive of a minimum log diameter indication â¢ receive an indication of the desired lumber characteristics to be produced by milling â¢ determine a cut plan based on the received diameter indication and lumber characteristics Â· issue at least one of a sequence of operational control signals to a drive assembly of a mobile saw mill apparatus to effect rotation of a log in accordance with the cut plan after each transit of a saw along substantially the length of the log deck of the mobile saw mill apparatus. 20. A computer program product as claimed in claim 19 wherein a cut plan is determined by dividing the effective volume of the log determined by the minimum log diameter information into a plurality of concentric rings with the number of rings being dictated by the received lumber characteristics, and by dividing each ring into separate lumber components based on the received lumber characteristics.
